---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new skill, workflow, script, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the new skill or improvement in one or two sentences.

## Problem

What problem does this solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the expected workflow, behavior, or output.

## Scope

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Improve existing skill
- [ ] Add script
- [ ] Add references
- [ ] Improve documentation

## Example prompts

List example user requests that should trigger this skill or workflow.

## Notes

Add any extra context, constraints, or references.
